description_long: This is a modern, tactical shotgun with a compact bullpup design, featuring a matte black finish and angular, robust contours. The receiver and stock are integrated into a single streamlined body, with a prominent pistol grip and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control. The barrel is relatively short and partially shrouded, with a rail system mounted on top for optics or accessories. The trigger guard is large and squared, providing ample space for gloved fingers, and the magazine appears to be internal, typical of bullpup shotguns. The overall construction suggests a polymer and metal build, optimized for urban tactical use.
description: A compact, tactical bullpup shotgun with a matte black finish, vertical foregrip, and integrated rail system. Its robust, angular design is suited for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, pistol grip, vertical foregrip, and rail system on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel shroud, and the alignment of the rail and foregrip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, pistol grip, and the overall compactness of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock end, top rail, and the back of the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and partially shrouded with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: full stock integrated into bullpup body
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, squared trigger guard with ample space and no finger grooves
